# Function to convert log timestamp to ISO-8601 format
convert_timestamp() {
    local log_date="$1"
    local log_time="$2"
    local year=$(date +%Y)
    
    # Convert month name to number
    local month_num=$(date -d "$log_date $year" +%m 2>/dev/null || echo "01")
    local day=$(echo "$log_date" | awk '{print $2}')
    local month=$(echo "$log_date" | awk '{print $1}')
    
    case "$month" in
        Jan) month_num="01" ;;
        Feb) month_num="02" ;;
        Mar) month_num="03" ;;
        Apr) month_num="04" ;;
        May) month_num="05" ;;
        Jun) month_num="06" ;;
        Jul) month_num="07" ;;
        Aug) month_num="08" ;;
        Sep) month_num="09" ;;
        Oct) month_num="10" ;;
        Nov) month_num="11" ;;
        Dec) month_num="12" ;;
    esac
    
    echo "${year}-${month_num}-${day}T${log_time}"
}

# Function to extract IP from log line
extract_ip() {
    local line="$1"
    # Try to extract IP from auth.log format first
    local ip=$(echo "$line" | grep -oE '([0-9]{1,3}\.){3}[0-9]{1,3}' | head -1)
    if [[ -n "$ip" ]]; then
        echo "$ip"
    else
        # Try HTTP log format
        echo "$line" | cut -d' ' -f1
    fi
}

extract_log_timestamp() {
    local line="$1"
    # Try auth.log format
    if [[ "$line" =~ ^[A-Za-z]{3}[[:space:]]+[0-9]{1,2}[[:space:]]+[0-9]{2}:[0-9]{2}:[0-9]{2} ]]; then
        local date_part=$(echo "$line" | awk '{print $1 " " $2}')
        local time_part=$(echo "$line" | awk '{print $3}')
        convert_timestamp "$date_part" "$time_part"
    else
        # Try HTTP log format
        echo "$line" | cut -d'[' -f2 | cut -d']' -f1 | sed 's|/| |g' | awk '{printf "%04d-%02d-%02dT%s\n", $3, (index("JanFebMarAprMayJunJulAugSepOctNovDec",$1)+2)/3, $2, $4}'
    fi

        rule_timeframe["$id"]="$timeframe"
